title: VALLEY FAMILY HEALTH CARE - 211info
text: VALLEY FAMILY HEALTH CARE ONTARIO VALLEY FAMILY HEALTH CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include primary care, care of acute and chronic conditions, family dentistry, prenatal care/delivery, family planning, and immunizations. Also offers mental health evaluations and counseling for youth and adults in an individual, family, or group setting, and psychiatric medicine services. 2327 SW 4th Avenue Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Medical: Monday-Friday 8am-8pm Saturday 8am-6pm Sunday noon-6pm Dental: Monday-Thursday 8am-6:30pm Friday 8am-4:30pmWednesday 8am-1pm Toothache Clinic: Friday 8am-1pm Email (541) 889-2340 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 889-2340 Medical (541) 889-0052 Dental (541) 889-2598 FAX Main phone (541) 889-2340 Main phone (541) 889-0052 Dental Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts Medicaid, private insurance, and payments; offers sliding scale fees DOCUMENTS: Insurance card, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Malheur County SITE HOURS: Medical: Monday-Friday 8am-8pm Saturday 8am-6pm Sunday noon-6pm Dental: Monday-Thursday 8am-6:30pm Friday 8am-4:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Next to Bi-Mart and Joann's Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Birth Control Counseling Childhood Immunization Delivery/Childbirth Family and Community Medicine Family Counseling General Dentistry General Medical Care Group Counseling Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Prenatal Care Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
